subcodes.first_line: That which thou didst send hath indeed reached this Most Great Prison. God willing, through His gracious favors in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاز ما ارسلته فی هذا السجن العظیم انشاء الله بعنایت الهی در این ایام
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
